creativeBrief.title: Why Local Rendering Changes the Product Risk
creativeBrief.audience: founders and product operators evaluating an automated video pipeline
creativeBrief.objective: Show that local MP4 generation turns publishing into an integration problem instead of a product problem.

script.voiceover:
Why Local Rendering Changes the Product Risk. Show that local MP4 generation turns publishing into an integration problem instead of a product problem.

Point 1. Draft packages need enough structure to be reviewed without guesswork.

Point 2. Rendering locally proves the creative system can produce actual assets.

Point 3. Once MP4 quality is acceptable, distribution can be handled by platform integrations.

What this unlocks. When the MP4 is real, publishing is just the next integration layer.

designBrief.positioning: A practical content operations system that proves draft-to-MP4 quality locally before publishing integrations are added.

metadata.title: Why Local Rendering Changes the Product Risk
metadata.description:
Show that local MP4 generation turns publishing into an integration problem instead of a product problem.

Key points:
- Draft packages need enough structure to be reviewed without guesswork.
- Rendering locally proves the creative system can produce actual assets.
- Once MP4 quality is acceptable, distribution can be handled by platform integrations.

qaChecklist: Script has a hook, supporting points, and close.
Storyboard contains one or more timed scenes.
Captions are present for each scene.
Design brief covers visual, motion, audio, caption, and platform decisions.
Renderer can create a local MP4, thumbnail, and preview frame from this package.
